MASTER CALENDAR COURT

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Dec-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, not contested, and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed and Wells Fargo has presented sufficient evidence showing its entitlement to judgment in its favor and against defendant McKinley Clemons in the amount of $16,04.35 plus allowable costs.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (301/HEK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication

Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (301/HEK)
